description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, black touchscreen display with a thin bezel and a small cutout at the top for a front-facing camera and possibly a speaker. The back is a smooth, dark surface with two camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and appear to be made of a matte or lightly textured material, with visible buttons for volume and power. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for everyday urban use. The device appears lightweight and compact, fitting comfortably in one hand.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a slim, rounded design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black touchscreen display with a small cutout at the top for the front camera.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the slim profile and visible side buttons, likely for volume control.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a smooth dark surface with two vertically aligned camera lenses and a flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional slimness and possible power button placement.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, showing no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back; a single front-facing camera is centered above the screen.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on both the left and right edges, likely including a volume rocker and a power button.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: A light gray, form-fitting case covers the back and sides, with a smooth matte finish and precise cutouts for cameras and buttons.
